content.text:
<analysis>
a. Summarize the event type and context:
This is a pull request review request for PR #245 titled "[codex] add proteostasis workbook-to-GOA comparison tooling". The PR adds tooling to compare Proteostasis Consortium workbook rows against local GOA files, including a new project document, Python module, and tests.

b. Determine if this is a request for code review feedback or for implementation:
This is a request for code review feedback. The direct prompt asks me to review the PR and provide feedback on code quality, potential bugs, performance, security, test coverage, etc.

c. List key information from the provided data:
- PR adds 833 lines, deletes 0
- 4 files changed: project.justfile, PROTEOSTASIS.md, compare_pn_to_goa.py, test_pn_goa_compare.py
- Adds tooling to compare proteostasis workbook data to GOA files
- Includes focused tests and a justfile recipe
- Author has validated with pytest, ruff, and manual testing

d. Outline the main tasks and potential challenges:
- Read and analyze all 4 changed files
- Review Python code for quality, bugs, performance, security issues
- Check test coverage and quality
- Review project documentation
- Provide constructive feedback on each aspect
- May need to understand the broader codebase context via CLAUDE.md

e. Propose a high-level plan of action:
1. Read CLAUDE.md for repo-specific guidelines
2. Read all 4 changed files thoroughly
3. Analyze code quality, structure, and best practices
4. Check for potential bugs, security issues, performance concerns
5. Evaluate test coverage and test quality
6. Review documentation quality
7. Provide comprehensive feedback via GitHub comment

f. If unable to complete certain steps:
I should be able to complete all review tasks using the Read tool. No special permissions needed for code review.
</analysis>

I'll analyze this pull request and provide comprehensive code review feedback. Let me start by creating a todo list and gathering context.

input.body: ### PR Review: Proteostasis Workbook-to-GOA Comparison Tooling Conducting a comprehensive review of this PR. Here's my progress: #### Review Checklist - [ ] Read repository guidelines and context - [ ] Analyze project documentation changes - [ ] Review core Python module implementation - [ ] Examine test coverage and quality - [ ] Check justfile recipe integration - [ ] Evaluate code quality and best practices - [ ] Check for potential bugs and security issues - [ ] Assess performance considerations - [ ] Provide final recommendations --- [View job run](https://github.com/ai4curation/ai-gene-review/actions/runs/24220194045)
